rulings.Case Title: MICHAEL SHROPSHIRE et al VS. ASBESTOS DEFENDANTS (B/P)AS REFLECTED ON EXHIBITS et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion To Reconsider Order Denying Defendants Motion For Summary Judgment [Ccp 1008(A)]
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, November 08, 2010 in Department 220 at 9:30 AM., Line 3. Defendant O¿Connor Lumber¿s motion for reconsideration is granted, but, upon reconsideration, the court re-affirms the denial of defendant¿s motion reconsideration. The testimony of Mr. Shropshire, Mr. Wellington, Mr. Dowds and Mr. Lewis create a triable issue whether Mr. Shropshire was exposed to asbestos-containing FixAll attributable to defendant. = (220/HEK)

rulings.Case Title: BERRY & BERRY, A PROFESSIONAL LAW CORPORATION VS. GABRIELLE JACKSON et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Defendant Gabriel Jackson'S Demurrer To Complaint
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, November 08, 2010 in Department 220 at 9:30 AM., Line 6. Gabriel Jackson¿s demurrer to the complaint should be heard in one of the law and motion departments. The complaint does not allege asbestos exposure nor is it filed in the complex asbestos case number. The demurring party should re-file her demurrer in the appropriate law and motion department. = (220/HEK)
